title: Costco buys remaining stake in Taiwan joint venture for $1.05 billion
text: (Reuters) -Costco Wholesale Corp said on Thursday it bought the 45% stake it did not already own in its Taiwan joint venture, Costco-Taiwan, for $1.05 billion.

title: Costco Wholesale Corporation Acquires Minority Interest in Costco-Taiwan
text: ISSAQUAH, Wash., June 30, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Costco Wholesale Corporation (“Costco” or the “Company”) has completed a purchase for $1.05 billion by a wholly-owned subsidiary of the 45% minority interest in Costco-Taiwan, a joint venture, from our long-time joint venture partners. The Company now indirectly owns all of Costco Taiwan. We estimate that the purchase will be approximately one to one and one-half percent accretive to earnings per share.

title: Costco: A Counter-Cyclical SaaS-Like Business Model
text: In the last 12 months, Costco earned a pretax income of $7.4B, in that same time frame Costco took in membership fees of $4.1B. Roughly 55% of Costco's pre-tax income. $3.3B in profits implies that, after factoring in COGS and operating costs, Costco only makes a ~1.6% pre-tax margin on the products they sell to their customers.

title: Costco May sales rise nearly 17%
text: Costco Wholesale Corp. COST, +6.70% said late Thursday its May sales rose 16.9% to $18.23 billion. Same-store sales rose 15.5%, the company said, with online sales up 6.3%.
